definitions: adj. 巨大的（在此语境下形容恒星的规模）

examples.text: From these ingredients stars arose, gigantic engines, turning simple stuff into complex stuff only to die violently and spread the new complexity around.
examples.explanation: 此处 gigantic 修饰 engines（恒星），强调其体积与能量的巨大。

examples.text: We turned the land into fields worked by millions of machines, built thousands of gigantic jungles made of sand and metal.
examples.explanation: 此处 gigantic 修饰 jungles，隐喻由金属和沙土构成的人造巨型建筑群。

reviewSessions.example_text: From these ingredients stars arose, gigantic engines, turning simple stuff into complex stuff only to die violently and spread the new complexity around.
expected_definitions: adj. 巨大的（在此语境下形容恒星的规模）
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，抓住了 gigantic 在句中表示“巨大的”的核心含义。
